headlines.description: — VJ Edgecombe scored 25 points, including a 3-pointer with 1.7 seconds left in overtime to give the Philadelphia 76ers a 139-136 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies in a tight game Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Edgecombe's 3-pointer in closing seconds gives 76ers a 139-136 overtime victory over Grizzlies

video.headline: Philadelphia 76ers vs. Memphis Grizzlies: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Philadelphia 76ers vs. Memphis Grizzlies: Game Highlights) 2025/12/31 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Derrick White scored 13 of his 27 points in the fourth quarter and added a career-high seven blocks in a one-of-a-kind performance Tuesday night that carried the Boston Celtics to a 129-119 win over the Utah Jazz.
headlines.shortLinkText: Derrick White has 27 points and 7 blocks to lead Celtics past Jazz 129-119

headlines.description: — LeBron James scored 17 points on his 41st birthday, but Cade Cunningham had 27 points and 11 assists while leading the Detroit Pistons to a 128-106 victory over the Los Angeles Lakers on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: LeBron James loses on his 41st birthday as Cunningham leads the Pistons past the Lakers, 128-106

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard scored 33 points and the Los Angeles Clippers extended their winning streak to a season-best five games Tuesday night with a 131-90 victory over the Sacramento Kings.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leonard scores 33 as Clippers extend win streak to 5 with 131-90 rout of Kings
